armor.name: Tattered Cloth
armor.description: Stitched together from whatever was at hand. Better than nothing.

armor.name: Worn Leather Vest
armor.description: Cracked and stiff. Somebody died wearing this.

armor.name: Rusty Chainmail
armor.description: Half the links are missing. Still stops a bite.

armor.name: Padded Armor
armor.description: Layered cloth packed with cave straw. Crude but honest protection.

armor.name: Leather Jerkin
armor.description: Cut from something tougher than cow. The stitching holds.

armor.name: Apprentice Robes
armor.description: Faded blue with a singed hem. The last wearer learned something the hard way.

armor.name: Studded Leather
armor.description: Iron studs hammered into boiled hide. Cave-made, but sturdy.

armor.name: Scout Armor
armor.description: Light enough to run in. That matters down here.

armor.name: Acolyte Vestments
armor.description: White once. The prayer stitched into the collar is to a god that doesn't answer.

armor.name: Etched Chainmail
armor.description: Heavy and well-kept. Whoever wore it before knew what they were doing.

armor.name: Ranger Leathers
armor.description: Supple and dark. Made for someone who expected to be hunted.

armor.name: Mage Robes
armor.description: The fabric hums faintly. You can feel it when the cave goes quiet.

armor.name: Spider Silk Wraps
armor.description: Impossibly light. The silk doesn't tear — you have to cut it.

armor.name: Carved Stone Plate
armor.description: Carved from the giant's own armor. It cracked when he fell. Still heavier than anything you've lifted.

armor.name: Stalker's Vest
armor.description: The edges seem to blur in dim light. You feel less visible wearing it.

armor.name: Scorched Scale Vest
armor.description: Peeled from something that breathed fire. The scales are still warm.

armor.name: Drake's Cowl
armor.description: Stitched from drake membrane. The cowl whispers when you channel through it.

weapons.name: Broken Sword
weapons.description: Snapped at the hilt. The edge still cuts if you hold it right.

weapons.name: Worn Shortbow
weapons.description: The string frays at both ends. Every shot might be the last.

weapons.name: Cracked Wand
weapons.description: Split down the middle. The magic leaks out like heat from a cracked lantern.

weapons.name: Iron Axe
weapons.description: Functional. Heavy. Not made for elegance.

weapons.name: Hunting Bow
weapons.description: Built for game, not war. It'll do for both.

weapons.name: Apprentice Staff
weapons.description: Ash wood with a copper cap. Hums when you grip it too tight.

weapons.name: Light Mace
weapons.description: Dented but solid. Doesn't need an edge to break bones.

weapons.name: Shortbow
weapons.description: Compact and tense. Pulls harder than it looks.

weapons.name: Channeling Rod
weapons.description: Iron wrapped in copper wire. The tip glows faintly in the dark.

weapons.name: Notched Blade
weapons.description: Someone scratched symbols into the flat of the blade. They might mean something.

weapons.name: Warhammer
weapons.description: Too heavy to swing fast. You only need to swing it once.

weapons.name: Longbow
weapons.description: Yew wood, well-oiled. Reach matters when the cave opens up.

weapons.name: Mage Staff
weapons.description: Oak core with iron banding. The wood grain follows no natural pattern.

weapons.name: Dire Rat Fang
weapons.description: Pulled from a jaw the size of your head. The venom still weeps from the root.

weapons.name: Sporecap Wand
weapons.description: Carved from a fungal stalk. Pulses with a slow, living warmth.

weapons.name: Notched Cleaver
weapons.description: Chipped from use, not neglect. The brute knew how to hit.

weapons.name: Crystal Shard
weapons.description: Grown, not forged. The edge is sharper than steel but brittle.

weapons.name: Gnarled Cudgel
weapons.description: A femur sharpened to a point. The troll used it on everything.

weapons.name: Webspinner Bow
weapons.description: Strung with spider silk. The arrows fly silent.

weapons.name: Bone Staff
weapons.description: Cold to the touch. The marrow inside is black and still.

weapons.name: Stone Maul
weapons.description: A stone column broken from the cave wall. The giant called it a weapon.

weapons.name: Darkwood Bow
weapons.description: The wood is so dark it drinks the torchlight. Silent to draw.

weapons.name: Smoldering Rod
weapons.description: The tip glows like a dying ember. It never goes out.

weapons.name: Trollhide Cleaver
weapons.description: The blade is wrapped in troll hide that refuses to rot. Cuts deeper the harder you swing.

weapons.name: Phasefang
weapons.description: Shimmers at the edges like a heat mirage. Strikes from angles that shouldn't exist.

weapons.name: Drakescale Staff
weapons.description: Scaled in drake hide with a core of compressed flame. The air warps around it.

weapons.name: Basilisk Fangs
weapons.description: Each fang drips with venom that smells of copper and decay.

weapons.name: Petrifying Gaze
weapons.description: Not a weapon you hold. A weapon that holds you.

consumables.name: Minor Health Potion
consumables.description: Tastes like copper and moss. It works.

consumables.name: Health Potion
consumables.description: Cleaner than the minor version. Somebody knew what they were brewing.

consumables.name: Greater Health Potion
consumables.description: Thick and amber. Closes wounds you can watch.

consumables.name: Fortifying Stew
consumables.description: Thick, grey, and vaguely warm. Your arms feel steadier after.

consumables.name: Quickening Berries
consumables.description: Bitter and bright red. Your hands shake for a moment, then everything feels faster.

consumables.name: Focusing Tea
consumables.description: Brewed from cave herbs. The world narrows to a point.

consumables.name: Bloodrage Tonic
consumables.description: Thick and red. Your muscles swell but the world feels fragile.

consumables.name: Stoneskin Salve
consumables.description: Hardens your skin to stone. Moving gets harder. Getting hit gets easier.

consumables.name: Trollblood Ale
consumables.description: Brewed from something best not named. Strength surges. Thought retreats.

consumables.name: Venom Vial
consumables.description: Sealed with wax. The glass is already corroding from the inside.

consumables.name: Spore Cloud
consumables.description: Crushed cave fungus in a thin pouch. One squeeze and the mind goes foggy.

consumables.name: Sapping Poison
consumables.description: Soak a blade or throw the bottle. Either way, they swing softer.

consumables.name: Rat Tooth
consumables.description: Small, sharp, and useless for anything but selling.

consumables.name: Cave Moss
consumables.description: Damp and faintly luminescent. Alchemists might pay for it.

consumables.name: Cracked Bone
consumables.description: Could be human. Could be something else.

consumables.name: Dull Crystal
consumables.description: Barely catches the light. Worth a few coins to the right buyer.

consumables.name: Tattered Hide
consumables.description: Stripped from something that didn't survive the cave.

consumables.name: Bent Nail
consumables.description: Pulled from a coffin. Or a wall. Hard to say.

consumables.name: Flashpowder
consumables.description: A handful of blinding dust. Throw it and run — they won't see which way you went.

consumables.name: Antidote
consumables.description: A bitter herbal tincture that purges venom from the blood. Drink fast.
